parse.title: Hubris
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item, see {{ii|Ataraxia}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue =
{{gold value|Eminence Gold Value|nolink=}}
* 12 [[attack damage]] = {{g|{{#vardefineecho:basebonus|{{#expr:{{#var:ad}}*12}}}}}}

{{gold value|Eminence Gold Value per Stack|nolink=}}
* 3 [[attack damage]] = {{g|{{#vardefineecho:perrank|{{#expr:{{#var:ad}}*3}}}}}}
|goldefficiency =
* {{iis|Hubris}} gold efficiency while {{sbc|Eminence}} is active increases by {{gec|Hubris|+{{#var:basebonus}}}}, further increased by {{gec|Hubris|+{{#var:perrank}}}} for each stack.
|similaritems =Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;The Collector;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker 
|background = 
|notes = 
* Subsequent takedowns while {{sbc|Eminence}} is already active refresh the buff's duration and update the bonus attack damage value.
* {{sbc|Eminence's}} buff is removed upon [[death]], like most buffs.<!--is it true that it couldn't be gained while dead at some point?-->
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* '''Hubris's''' icon is a reference to the laurel wreath, an ancient Greek symbol of triumph and victory worn on the head.
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small" widths="150px">
Hubris takedown scored VFX.png|Passive Gained VFX
Hubris passive VFX.png|Passive Bonus VFX
Hubris statue VFX.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 0-1)
Hubris statue VFX 2.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 2)
Hubris statue VFX 3.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 3)
Hubris statue VFX 4.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 4)
Hubris statue VFX 5.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 5)
Hubris statue VFX 6.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 6)
Hubris statue VFX 7.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 7)
Hubris statue VFX 8.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 8)
Hubris statue VFX 9.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 9)
Hubris statue VFX 10.png|Old Statue VFX (Rank 10+)
Hubris statue locations.png|Old Sumomoner's Rift Statue Locations (Blue Side)
Hubris statue locations 2.png|Old Sumomoner's Rift Statue Locations (Red Side)
</gallery>
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.09]]
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.
* Eminence base bonus attack damage reduced to 12 from 15.
* Eminence bonus attack damage per stack increased to 3 from 2.

;[[V26.05]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2800}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|750}} from {{g|950}}.

;[[V14.19]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|950}} from {{g|900}}.
** Total cost unchanged.
* Ability haste reduced to 10 from 15.

;[[V14.11]]
* Can no longer be upgraded to {{ii|Ataraxia}}.

;[[V14.5]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} VFX no longer incorrectly disappears if the player disconnected and reconnected to the game.

;[[V14.4]]
* {{sbc|Removed:}} Ego no longer spawns statues.
** Eminence bonus attack damage scaling is now based on the number of times the effect is triggered.

;[[V14.2]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Added statue locations on maps other than Summoner's Rift.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} {{ii|Ataraxia}} now grants Eminence's bonus for the correct duration.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} {{iis|Ataraxia}} tooltip now provides the intended values for Eminence.

;[[V14.1#January 12th Hotfix|V14.1]] - January 12th Hotfix
* Eminence base bonus attack damage increased to 15 from 10.
* Eminence bonus attack damage per statue increased to 2 from 1.
* Eminence duration increased to 90 seconds from 60.

;[[V14.1]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|3000}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 15 ability haste, 18 lethality.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Ego:}} Scoring a {{tip|champion}} takedown summons a ''Statue'' of yourself near the outer side of the [[spawn]]. For each takedown scored, gain a ''rank'' that upgrades your ''Statue''.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Eminence:}} Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them grants you {{as|10|ad}} (+ 1 per ''Statue rank'') {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} for 60 seconds.
* Limited to 1 '''Hubris'''.
* {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Ataraxia}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 75 attack damage, 20 ability haste, 27 lethality.
}}

[[Category:Season 2024 item release]]
[[ru:Гордыня]]
